metadata.name: Collect Evidence — Crimestopper Sprite exiles GY cards as additional cost
metadata.description: Tests the Collect Evidence keyword action (CR 701.59a) as an optional additional cost when casting Crimestopper Sprite ({2}{U}). P1 has Doom Blade (MV 2) and Wrath of God (MV 4) in their graveyard — total MV 6, exactly meeting the Collect Evidence 6 threshold. P1 casts Crimestopper Sprite using the cast_spell_collect_evidence harness action, specifying those two graveyard cards as collect_evidence_cards. After casting, both exiled cards should be gone from the graveyard and present in exile. After resolution, Crimestopper Sprite is on the battlefield with evidence_collected: true. The ETB trigger (tap target creature; put stun counter if evidence collected) requires a legal target — since no opposing creatures are on the battlefield the trigger has no valid target and fizzles. The script focuses on the cast-time Collect Evidence mechanics.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 701.59a: To collect evidence N means to exile cards from your graveyard with total MV >= N as an additional cost. CR 701.59c: The ETB ability is linked to the additional cost via CR 607 — 'if evidence was collected' is only true when the optional additional cost was paid during casting. Graveyard cards chosen: Doom Blade (MV 2) + Wrath of God (MV 4) = total MV 6, exactly meeting the Collect Evidence 6 threshold. P1 mana pool pre-filled with {2}{U} (colorless: 2, blue: 1) to pay Crimestopper Sprite's base cost {2}{U}. The collect_evidence_cards field in the harness PlayerAction carries the names of graveyard cards to exile as cost payment. After cost payment but before the spell is placed on the stack the exiled cards move from graveyard to exile (CR 118.9). After resolution the engine sets evidence_collected: true on the resulting permanent per CR 701.59c. The ETB trigger targets no creature (none on battlefield), so the trigger fizzles. The evidence_collected assertion in the final assert_state is marked speculative — it tests a field the engine may not yet expose; a dispute is recorded for this.

disputes.description: The evidence_collected field assertion on the battlefield permanent may not yet be supported by the assertion evaluator. If the harness cannot evaluate 'evidence_collected' on a permanent, this is an engine gap rather than a script error. The core collect-evidence mechanic (GY cards moved to exile at cast time) is the primary thing being tested and should pass independently.

script.step_note: P1 casts Crimestopper Sprite with Collect Evidence 6 paid by exiling Doom Blade (MV 2) + Wrath of God (MV 4) from graveyard

actions.description: Initial: Crimestopper Sprite in p1 hand; Doom Blade and Wrath of God in p1 graveyard; exile zone empty; stack empty
actions.note: P1 has 2 graveyard cards with combined MV 6 (Doom Blade MV 2 + Wrath of God MV 4), exactly meeting the Collect Evidence 6 threshold per CR 701.59a.

CR 701.59a: P1 pays Collect Evidence 6 by exiling Doom Blade (MV 2) + Wrath of God (MV 4) = total MV 6 from graveyard as an additional cost. CR 601.2: base cost {2}{U} paid from mana pool. Exiled cards move from graveyard to exile as part of cost payment.

actions.description: After casting: Crimestopper Sprite on stack; graveyard empty (exiled cards moved to exile); exile contains Doom Blade and Wrath of God
actions.note: CR 406.2: Cards exiled as an additional cost move to the exile zone at cast time (cost payment step), before the spell is placed on the stack. Both GY cards are now in exile.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Crimestopper Sprite spell resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Crimestopper Sprite resolves and enters the battlefield as a 2/2 Faerie Detective with Flying. The evidence_collected flag is true because Collect Evidence 6 was paid (CR 701.59c). The ETB trigger fires but has no legal targets — no creatures on the battlefield — so it fizzles.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Creature spell resolves onto the battlefield. CR 701.59c: the ETB ability is linked to whether evidence was collected; since the additional cost was paid, evidence_collected is true on the resulting permanent.

actions.description: Final: Crimestopper Sprite on p1 battlefield; exile contains both exiled GY cards; p1 graveyard does not contain them; stack empty
actions.note: CR 701.59a: Both graveyard cards (total MV 6) remain in exile permanently — they are not returned at any point. Crimestopper Sprite is on the battlefield. Stack is empty.
